title: Snowmachine Specific Avalanche Awareness – 6:30-8pm, AMDS, Nov 30th !!
summary: Join CNFAIC forecasters at Alaska Mining and Diving Supply for a discussion on Snowmachine Specific Avalanche Awareness and Rescue. Topics addressed will be - Recognizing safe zones vs. avalanche terrain, situational awareness and rescue. We hope to see you and your riding buddies Wednesday, Nov 30t...
